V(U,k+(-649140-(-649141)),k+(-335282+335283))~="\061"then Q(d,j(x((e%(871271-805735))/(-651341-(-651597)))))end break end k=k+(-377154-(-377155))end l[q]=n(d)end end end return(function(q,Q,x,n,l,w,i,O,k,e,a,K,j,S,C,f,d,Y,o,t,h,D,U)K,e,Y,t,o,S,d,O,h,D,j,a,f,k,C,U=function(q)local V,j=201932-201931,q[-845+846]while j do U[j],V=U[j]-(731614+-731613),(164131-164130)+V end,function(q,V)local Q=e(V)local x=function(x)return j(q,{x},V,Q)end return x end,56927-56927,function(q,V)local Q=e(V)local x=function(x,n,l)return j(q,{x;n;l},V,Q)end return x end,{}return(S(10694993-282753,{}))(Q(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[V(3451+-54610)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
